command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix. Compatibility alias for the previous six-artifact matrix URL.

parsed.summary: Structured surface data for a refund escalation review that focuses the manager on evidence, policy fit, decision path, and handoff.

surface.heading: Nora Diaz refund request

selected.request: Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

info.label: Decision needed
info.value: Approve refund, send to policy review, or return for missing evidence

info.label: Outcome
info.value: Handoff with the next action and reason

evidence: Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
surface.policy: Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

handoff.title: Return for missing receipt
handoff.reason: Receipt photo is missing. Ask the customer to attach proof before approval.
handoff.action: Return the request to the support agent with the missing evidence request.
